meaning: n.[姓氏] 基尔帕特里克
examples: For a town with an image problem, Mr Kilpatrick is hardly helping.
Kwame Kilpatrick will pay a million dollars in restitution and lose his law license.
In the fall, "a Few Minutes with Andy Rooney" became a regular segment, alternating with Alexander and Kilpatrick.
Kilpatrick blamed his loss on the racial make-up of the jury and vowed to appeal.
Rep. KILPATRICK: And I speak for the Congressional Black Caucus 100 percent on this issue.
